hook.summary: A hand uses a stylus to unscrew parts of a giraffe puzzle while a narrator questions the level design.
hook.visual_action: Stylus unscrewing metal plates from a giraffe illustration on a tablet screen.
hook.voiceover_transcript: What great cleverness designed this level. It looks so easy, doesn't it?

scene_flow: Hand uses a stylus to remove screws from the giraffe's ears and head.
The head piece falls away, but the narrator expresses frustration as the puzzle pieces become stuck.
The stylus attempts to clear the neck area where multiple plates overlap and block each other.
The narrator issues a final challenge to the viewer to see if they can remove all the screws.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who are motivated by challenging or seemingly impossible brain teasers.
